description: Function renamed from delete_user to archive_user (soft-delete), but README and docstring still say 'permanently removes'. Should WARN on docs-sync.

input.staged_diff:
diff --git a/services/user_service.py b/services/user_service.py
index 1a2b3c4..5d6e7f8 100644
--- a/services/user_service.py
+++ b/services/user_service.py
@@ -10,8 +10,9 @@
-def delete_user(user_id: str) -> bool:
-    """Permanently removes the user and all associated data."""
-    db.execute('DELETE FROM users WHERE id = ?', user_id)
-    return True
+def archive_user(user_id: str) -> bool:
+    """Permanently removes the user and all associated data."""
+    db.execute('UPDATE users SET archived_at = NOW() WHERE id = ?', user_id)
+    return True
diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
index 2b3c4d5..6e7f8a9 100644
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
@@ -22,3 +22,3 @@
-Call `delete_user(id)` to permanently remove a user account and all data.
+Call `archive_user(id)` to permanently remove a user account and all data.
